auth.welcomeSubtitle:
For people like me who were tired of switching between three apps for
calorie tracking, gym workouts, and allergen checks
auth.loginIdentifierHint: Use your email address or username to sign in.
auth.usernameTaken: That username is already taken. Pick another one.
auth.emailTaken: That email address is already registered. Sign in instead.
auth.usernameInvalid: Username: 2–30 characters, no spaces. Use letters, numbers, _ or -.
auth.usernameHint: Public. Used to sign in. Letters, numbers, _ or - only.
auth.loginNotFound: No account found for that username. Try your email address instead.
auth.invalidCredentials: Wrong email/username or password. Check both and try again.
auth.emailNotConfirmed: Confirm your email first (check your inbox), then sign in.
auth.profileMissingBody: Your account exists, but your profile could not be loaded. Tap Retry. If it keeps failing, sign out and run migration 005 in Supabase, then sign in again.
auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.signUpSuccessMessage: Welcome to Macrio! You're signed in. Next, set up your allergens and goals.
auth.confirmEmailMessage: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Click the link, then sign in.

onboarding.allergensSubtitle: Products containing your allergens get a clear warning. You can change this later.
onboarding.goalsSubtitle: Enter what you want to eat per day.

goalsCalc.invalid: Enter a valid weight, height, and date of birth.
goalsCalc.disclaimer: kcal: maintenance ± goal (−500 / 0 / +300). Protein 1.6–2.0 g/kg by goal, fat 0.9 g/kg, carbs the rest. Not medical advice.
goalsCalc.kcalDrivesMacros: Change kcal and protein, fat, and carbs recalculate (when weight is known).

allergens.disclaimer: Allergen information is community-provided and may be incorrect. Always check the physical label. Macrio is not medical advice.
allergens.legend: grey = unknown · red = contains · orange = may contain · green = free from

diary.title: Diary
diary.focusSwipeHint: Swipe for next macro · long-press for all four

addFood.title: Add food
addFood.noResults: No results. Create the product yourself!
addFood.scanNotFoundBody: We don't know this barcode yet. Create the product and help the community!
addFood.cameraPermission: Macrio needs camera access to scan barcodes.
addFood.quickHint: Log quickly without a product — enter the macros yourself.
addFood.multiNeedGrams: Enter a valid weight (grams) for each product.

portion.title: Portion
portion.missingDate: Can't save because the diary day is unknown. Go back and open Add food from a day in your diary.
portion.loadFailed: Couldn't load this food. Go back and try again.

product.title: Product
product.name: Product name
product.allergenHint: grey = unknown · red = contains · orange = may contain · green = free from
product.barcodePlaceholder: Type digits, or add later from the product page
product.addBarcodeHint: You created this without a pack code. Type the digits under the bars, or scan the barcode so future scans find this product.
product.editBarcodeHint: Change the barcode by typing the digits under the bars or scanning again. You can also remove it if it was wrong.
product.barcodeHelpEan13: EAN-13 (13 digits): standard on European packs. Product ID only. Use this in Macrio.
product.barcodeHelpUpc: UPC-A (12 digits): common in the US and Canada. Macrio stores it as 13 digits (leading 0).
product.barcodeHelpGs1128: GS1-128: longer logistics codes (expiry, lot, …). Do not use those. Scan or type the short EAN/UPC on the front or back of the pack.
product.deleteBarcodeConfirm: This product will no longer be found by barcode scan until you add a code again.
product.barcodeAlreadySet: This product already has a barcode.
product.barcodeTaken: That barcode is already used by another product.
product.barcodeInvalid: Enter a valid retail barcode (EAN-8, UPC-A, or EAN-13).
product.barcodeWrongLength: Use 8, 12 or 13 digits (EAN-8, UPC-A or EAN-13). Not a longer code.
product.barcodeGs1128: That looks like a GS1-128 / logistics code. Use the short EAN-13 or UPC-A printed for the product, without expiry or lot data.
product.barcodeBadCheck: Those digits are not a valid barcode (check digit failed). Double-check the numbers under the bars.
product.sharedWithEveryone: This product is shared with everyone using Macrio.
product.keepPrivate: Keep this ingredient private (only I can see it)
product.visibilityOwnerOnly: Only the creator can change visibility.

reports.title: Reports
reports.noData: No data for this period yet
reports.setGoalInSettings: Set this goal in Settings for personal targets (using defaults for now).

settings.title: Settings
settings.bodySavedBody: Height, date of birth, weight, gender, activity, and daily goals (kcal/macros) were written to your profile.
settings.bodyMetricsMigrationHint: Could not save body details. In Supabase SQL Editor, run migrations 006_profile_body_metrics.sql and 007_profile_weight_goal.sql, then try again.
settings.aboutText: Macrio is open source and free. Your donations help keep the app free.
settings.deleteConfirmBody: All your diary data will be permanently erased. Products you created remain anonymously for the community.
settings.sentryTestSent: Test error sent. Check Issues in Sentry.
settings.sentryTestDisabled: Sentry is off. Set EXPO_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN in app/.env.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.intro: Tell us what's missing, broken, or could be better. Your feedback drives the roadmap!
feedback.thanks: Thank you! Your feedback steers the roadmap.
